response.justification: While this candidate dramatically exceeds all technical requirements with Staff-level expertise across TypeScript, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS, and Kubernetes, they are fundamentally misaligned with a Junior/Mid-level entry role. As a current Staff Engineer with 15+ years of professional experience, this represents an acute overqualification and retention risk. Their career trajectory and salary expectations would be incompatible with the position's growth path and compensation band, making this a poor mutual fit despite exceptional technical capabilities.
strengths: Expert-level technical mastery across all required stack: TypeScript, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Docker, REST APIs, clean architecture, and TDD
Proven ability to architect and ship production systems at scale with significant user impact (millions of mails at Optilyz, millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby)
Demonstrated teaching and mentorship capability through workshops, open-source projects (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts), and collaborative culture-building
concerns: Severely overqualified: Staff Engineer applying to Junior/Mid-level role creates predictable disengagement and retention risk within 6 months
Compensation expectations for a Staff-level engineer would likely exceed 2-3x the budgeted salary for entry-level position, creating negotiation impasse
No meaningful growth trajectory or technical challenge; role offers downward career movement, not progression

key_factors.factor: Career level mismatch (Staff applying to Junior/Mid)
Technical skills exceed all requirements by significant margin
